Subject: Price Reservations 5 February 2002 Real-Time and Hour-Ahead
Message:
The NYISO is reserving hour beginning 11:00 in the February 5,
2002 Real-Time Market.

In addition, the NYISO is reserving the following hours in the February 5,
2002 Hour-Ahead Locational Reserve Market: 06:00-8:00, 10:00,12:00,13:00,
16:00-19:00, 21:00 and 22:00.

Prices in the February 6, 2002 Day-Ahead Market are correct.

This e-mail information is a copy of the official posting which can be
found at the following address of our website:
http://mis.nyiso.com/public/htm/OperMessages/CurrentOperMessages.htm#mm
